# Competitor Intelligence Report
**Date:** April 13, 2026  
**Generated by:** Paw 🐾  
**Period:** Week of April 7–13, 2026

---

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

This was a good week for FMS. **Spartan Race Philippines is now officially powered by FindMyShots** — confirmed across Instagram, Facebook, and FMS's own channels. Pasig Event Weekend (April 3, 2026) was the first major Spartan event live on the platform, with next event at Sto. Tomas on September 5, 2026. On the threat side, **three Malaysia-based race photo platforms** were identified (RaceSniper, VE Picture, JomRun IPix) — directly relevant given FMS's Q3 2026 SEA expansion target in Malaysia.

---

- **Active in Malaysia:** Covering Kuching Half Marathon 2026 — ongoing SEA push beyond PH

### FinisherPix
- T100 Triathlon Singapore 2026 (April 25–26) approaching — FinisherPix expected to cover
- No new SEA expansion signals beyond Singapore triathlon circuit
- **Status: No change**

### Brightroom
- No public news or announcements detected
- Still US-focused; no SEA signals
- **Status: No change**

- FMS continues to displace informal channels: Spartan partnership is a signal that **organizers are switching from informal → FMS**

- **Trend: FMS gaining ground on informal market in PH**

## NEW COMPETITORS IDENTIFIED (Malaysia SEA Expansion Alert)

These three platforms are active in Malaysia and directly relevant to FMS's Q3 2026 SEA expansion target:

### 🆕 RaceSniper (Malaysia)
- **Base:** Kota Kinabalu, Sabah, Malaysia
- **Tagline:** "Capture the Grit"
- **Events covered:** Pearl of Borneo Marathon (POBM) 2026 (official partner), Jesselton Half Marathon 2026
- **Model:** Open photographer marketplace (similar to FMS)
- **Platform:** racesniper.com
- **Threat:** Active in Sabah running circuit — FMS's Malaysia entry may hit RaceSniper first in East Malaysia events
- **Weakness:** Appears small/regional (Sabah-focused); no AI facial recognition visible

### 🆕 VE Picture (Malaysia)
- **Events covered:** Guthrie Corridor Expressway Run (multiple dates 2026), KIPRUN KL Run, Pink Ride 2026
- **Platform:** vepicture.com
- **Focus:** Kuala Lumpur / Selangor corridor runs
- **Threat:** Active in West Malaysia (KL metropolitan running scene)
- **Weakness:** No visible AI search feature; appears basic photo gallery

### 🆕 JomRun IPix (Malaysia)
- **Integration:** Built into JomRun (leading Malaysia race registration platform)
- **Platform:** ipix.jomrunasia.com
- **Pitch:** "Automates tagging, branding and fast delivery of race photos to participants for social sharing"
- **Threat Level:** ⚠️ HIGH — JomRun has deep organizer relationships across Malaysia; IPix is baked into registration flow (similar to FMS's Rio prepay vision)
- **Weakness:** Appears focused on social sharing (free/branding model) vs. commerce; unclear revenue model

---

## FMS WIN THIS WEEK 🏆

### Spartan Race Philippines → Now Powered by FindMyShots
- **Source:** Instagram (@findmyshots, @spartanraceph), Facebook
- **Details:** Pasig Event Weekend 2026 (April 3) live on FMS; next event September 5 (Sto. Tomas Trailfecta)
- **Significance:** Spartan Race PH is one of the most recognizable obstacle/endurance brands in SEA. This is a flagship enterprise partnership and a public signal to other organizers that FMS is the go-to platform.
- **Quote found:** "Every obstacle conquered deserves a moment you can relive. Now, you can find, access, and share your race-day photos faster and more..."
- **Implication:** Spartan SEA partnership could follow — watch for Spartan events outside PH

---

## AI VISIBILITY CHECK

**Queries searched:**
1. "best race photography platform Southeast Asia"
2. "race photo app Philippines"
3. "event photo platform SEA"

**Results:**

| Platform | AI/Search Visibility |
|---|---|
| GeoSnapShot | ✅ Appearing — showed up in SEA race photo searches via event pages (Kuching HM 2026, AMEX HM 2026) |
| RaceSniper | ✅ Appearing — showed up in Malaysia race photography searches |
| JomRun IPix | 🟡 Partial — appears in Malaysia context via JomRun brand |
| VE Picture | ❌ Low — not appearing in broader searches |
| FinisherPix | 🟡 Appears on homepage/branded search; not in SEA-specific queries |
| **FindMyShots** | 🟡 Appearing for Philippines-specific queries ("race photo app Philippines") — **not yet appearing for SEA-wide queries** |

**Gap Analysis:**
- FMS shows up when people search Philippines specifically — good local SEO
- FMS is NOT appearing when the query is "Southeast Asia" — GeoSnapShot and RaceSniper are capturing that broader SEA intent
- GeoSnapShot's event pages (Kuching HM, etc.) are indexed well by search engines, giving them SEA-wide discoverability
- JomRun IPix benefits from JomRun's domain authority

**What FMS Should Do:**
1. Create SEA-focused landing pages and blog content ("race photography Southeast Asia", "event photos Malaysia", "race photo platform Thailand")
2. Ensure FMS event pages are SEO-optimized with location + event name keywords
3. Leverage the Spartan PH partnership announcement for PR — "FindMyShots powers Spartan Race Philippines" should be a press piece, not just a social post
4. Consider a "FindMyShots for Organizers" landing page targeting SEA organizers by country

---

## BATTLECARD UPDATE

### GeoSnapShot — UPDATED
- **Strongest selling point:** Free-to-join marketplace with 70% revenue to photographers; already covering PH + Malaysia events
- **Biggest weakness:** No AI facial recognition; inconsistent photo quality from open marketplace; web-only (no app)
- **How FMS beats them:** Face recognition finds photos even without bib; FMS is mobile-native; deeper event integration; local PH brand advantage

### RaceSniper — NEW ENTRY
- **Strongest selling point:** Official partner for major Sabah (East Malaysia) events; local community presence
- **Biggest weakness:** Appears regional/small scale; no visible AI; not in West Malaysia or other SEA markets
- **How FMS beats them:** AI face recognition; broader platform with more events; better UX; Philippines market head start; Rio-scale exclusive partnership model

### JomRun IPix — NEW ENTRY
- **Strongest selling point:** Baked into JomRun registration flow — organizer relationships are locked in
- **Biggest weakness:** Social sharing focus, not commerce; unclear if they have revenue model; dependent on JomRun's relationship decisions
- **How FMS beats them:** FMS is full commerce platform (runners pay for photos); FMS's prepay model will be similar integration depth; FMS has AI face recognition; FMS is SEA-wide vs. Malaysia-only

### Sportograf — NO CHANGE
- **Strongest selling point:** Exclusive contracts with IRONMAN, HYROX, Spartan (globally); Foto-Flat model simplifies purchase
- **Biggest weakness:** €90 pricing inaccessible to SEA markets; European-centric; locked into premium endurance niche
- **How FMS beats them:** Different market entirely — FMS owns everyday PH runners; Sportograf owns elite triathletes

---

## RECOMMENDED ACTIONS

1. **🏆 Capitalize on Spartan win:** Turn the Spartan partnership into a PR push — "FMS is now the official photo platform for Spartan Race Philippines." Pitch this to running media, issue a press release, and use it as proof point in organizer sales conversations.

2. **🌏 Malaysia entry research:** Before entering Malaysia in Q3, map the competitive landscape: RaceSniper (Sabah), VE Picture (KL), JomRun IPix (integrated). FMS's best entry is likely through **West Malaysia (KL) first**, targeting events not already locked by JomRun IPix.

3. **🔍 SEO gap fix:** FMS needs SEA-wide content (blog posts, landing pages) to appear in "race photography Southeast Asia" searches. GeoSnapShot is winning this visibility gap via event-level indexed pages.

4. **⚔️ Defend GeoSnapShot:** They're still covering Malaysia events (Kuching HM 2026). If FMS enters Malaysia, prioritize locking organizer relationships before GeoSnapShot does.
